relationship_to_paper: The repository is linked directly from page 1 of immutable arXiv v1. The pinned commit predates arXiv submission by about three hours, but the paper does not name a commit or tag; treat it as near-paper official release evidence, not demonstrated exact experiment state.
inspection_scope: Inspected all archive paths; read README, generation/probe/verification templates, all six Python pipeline/evaluation scripts and shell wrappers selectively around relevant execution paths; parsed all 100 backgrounds, 403 retained evidence-conversation records, 493 trace records, 403 distractor records, and 403 long-context records; audited operation/probe schemas, exact quote grounding, paired settings, release counts, model/judge defaults, aggregation and missing result artifacts. No untrusted code or paid endpoint was executed.
